extraction.one_line_summary: AYUSO Juan attacked solo on the Albula Pass descent, gained over a minute on the yellow jersey group, vaulted from 1:18 deficit to third overall at 18 seconds.
tactical_patterns: SKJELMOSE accelerated on descent to close gap to GALL group, using downhill technical skills to gain bonus seconds for GC.
SCARONI Felix attacked early on Albula climb to preemptively distance EVENEPOEL and SKJELMOSE before time trial Sunday.
AYUSO dropped breakaway companions KOSTA and TIBERI solo before summit, then extended advantage on descent—descending skills decisive.

rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: 20-year-old showed Grand Tour-level climbing and descending to gain 1:00+ solo, now serious GC threat at 18 seconds
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: lost time again on Albula climb, confirming weakness on long mountain passes despite upcoming favorable time trial
rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: regained yellow jersey through smart chase on descent and bonus seconds, demonstrating superior technical descending
rider_signals.GALL Felix: neutral: early attack tactically sound given time trial liability but couldn't sustain gap or match AYUSO's performance
